/usr/bin/ar qc libminimatch.a CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/exchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/event_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/fix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/fix_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/fix_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/fix_gateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/risk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/quant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/queue_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/router_market_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution_algo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution_replay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/market_replay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/market_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/market_recorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/coinbase_l2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/backtest_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/oms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution_risk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch.dir/src/execution_store.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminimatch.a
